case_title: MING MING LIU VS. RICHARD GUZMAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, MING MING AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-03-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-04-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-19-2011

ORDER VACATING SANCTION AS TO MING MING LIU IMPOSED ON AUG-31-2011.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR DEC-15-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOV-04-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
